[He placed his hammer in front of him, reaching the ground and spent a minute in his deep thoughts, as much as one who had such life can. Then, of calmer and unheard voice, he said to Mephilia]

Promise me one thing. If it turns sour, flee. People count on you still.

[And he left, to the north.]
